# webhooks-service

> QARoom webhooks-service: outbound delivery of the five QARoom events to external subscribers,
> with at-least-once delivery, a deterministic retry/backoff contract, and HMAC signing (Milestone 11).

A community registers an https endpoint and the events it wants; webhooks-service consumes those
events from NATS and POSTs a signed envelope to the endpoint, retrying on a deterministic
exponential backoff until success or dead-letter. It is a pure consumer — it publishes nothing.
The machine-readable contract is `openapi.yaml` (OpenAPI 3.0, generated from Zod); consumed events
are in `asyncapi.yaml`. Live capabilities at `GET /system/capabilities`, observable state at
`GET /system/state`. Every error is RFC 7807 `application/problem+json` with `retryable`,
`next_actions`, `failure_domain`.

## Operations
- POST   /api/communities/{communityId}/webhook-subscriptions                          — createWebhook (mutating; Idempotency-Key; returns write-once secret)
- GET    /api/communities/{communityId}/webhook-subscriptions                          — listWebhooks
- GET    /api/communities/{communityId}/webhook-subscriptions/{subscriptionId}         — getWebhook
- DELETE /api/communities/{communityId}/webhook-subscriptions/{subscriptionId}         — deleteWebhook (mutating; Idempotency-Key)
- POST   /api/communities/{communityId}/webhook-subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/pause   — pauseWebhook (mutating)
- POST   /api/communities/{communityId}/webhook-subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resume  — resumeWebhook (mutating)
- GET    /api/communities/{communityId}/webhook-subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/deliveries — listWebhookDeliveries
- GET    /system/state                                                                 — getSystemState
- GET    /system/capabilities                                                          — getSystemCapabilities

## Events
- receive: qaroom.content.posts.{community_id}.created       — PostCreatedEvent
- receive: qaroom.content.votes.{community_id}.cast          — VoteCastEvent
- receive: qaroom.flags.flag.{community_id}.changed          — FlagStateChangedEvent
- receive: qaroom.donations.donation.{community_id}.changed  — DonationStateChangedEvent
- receive: qaroom.moderator.decision.{community_id}.recorded — ModerationDecisionRecordedEvent

## Delivery headers (on every outbound POST)
- X-QARoom-Signature: v1=hex(hmac_sha256(secret, `${timestamp}.${body}`))
- X-QARoom-Timestamp, X-QARoom-Delivery-Id (stable; dedupe on this), X-QARoom-Event-Id

## Docs
- Contract: ./openapi.yaml · ./asyncapi.yaml
- Agent reference: ./AGENTS.md
- Decision record: /docs/adr/0019-webhooks-as-a-tested-delivery-edge.md
- Repo conventions: /AGENTS.md, /docs
